name: ECoLAD: Selecting Anomaly Detectors for Automotive Deployment via Compute-Reduction Evaluation
summary: arXiv:2603.10926v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Automotive anomaly detectors are often selected from accuracy only benchmarks on workstation class hardware, whereas in-vehicle monitoring...
description: arXiv:2603.10926v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Automotive anomaly detectors are often selected from accuracy only benchmarks on workstation class hardware, whereas in-vehicle monitoring requires predictable scoring latency under limited CPU parallelism. This mismatch can make methods that appear competitive offline infeasible for deployment. We present ECoLAD (Efficiency Compute Ladd...
author: Kadir-Kaan \"Ozer, Ren\'e Ebeling, Markus Enzweiler
